quotes.text: Code tells you how. Comments tell you why. Git blame tells you who to be angry at.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Every time you write a comment explaining 'why', a senior dev somewhere nods. Every time you write a comment explaining 'what', a senior dev somewhere drinks.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If your code needs comments to be understood, rewrite the code. If your code needs comments to be maintained, document the architecture.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Code never lies. Comments sometimes do.
quotes.author: Ron Jeffries
